allow: PowerShell(function chk\($n\){ $c = Get-Command $n -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){ "{0}: {1}" -f $n, $c.Source } else { "{0}: NOT FOUND" -f $n } }; chk git; chk gh; chk node; chk npm; chk pnpm; chk python)
PowerShell($w = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($w\){ "winget: $\($w.Source\)"; winget --version } else { "winget: NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); function chk\($n\){ $c = Get-Command $n -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){ "{0}: {1}" -f $n, \(& $n --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1\) } else { "{0}: still not found" -f $n } }; chk node; chk npm; chk gh)
